title: Syrian Phyllo Delight
description: A sweet and crispy dessert made with phyllo pastry, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the fryer or a deep frying pan with about 2-3 inches of fry oil to 375°F (190°C).
Cut the phyllo pastry into desired shapes and sizes.
In a small bowl, mix together the honey, cream cheese, and coffee until well combined.
Dip each phyllo piece into the honey mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Fry the phyllo pieces in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain the fried phyllo on paper towels and dust with powdered sugar.
